name: Halloween Spiders
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix peanut butter, powdered sugar, and graham cracker crumbs together until a ball forms.
2. Divide the ball into two parts, keeping one slightly smaller than the other.
3. Roll each part in coconut to coat evenly.
4. Place the smaller ball on top of the larger one; this will be the spider's head.
5. Add 8 pieces of licorice as legs and 8 raisins as eyes.
6. Makes 1 scary spider.
